title: Blind Signatures
description: Blind signatures let a signer authorize a token without seeing its final contents, enabling ecash mints to issue privately spendable proofs. They build directly on digital-signature verification.

resources.title: Cashu NUT-00: Nutshell
resources.notes: Protocol overview for blinded ecash issuance and redemption.

resources.notes: Bitcoin-specific context for blind-signature-based ecash systems.
